nasb.text: yet the Amorites persisted in living in Mount Heres, in Aijalon and in Shaalbim; but when the power of the house of Joseph grew strong, they became forced labor.

esv.text: The Amorites persisted in dwelling in Mount Heres, in Aijalon, and in Shaalbim, but the hand of the house of Joseph rested heavily on them, and they became subject to forced labor.

cnv.text: 亞摩利人決意住在希烈山、亞雅崙和沙賓；但約瑟家的勢力強大以後，他們就成了作苦工的人。

ccb.text: 亚摩利人执意住在希烈山、亚雅伦和沙宾，但约瑟家族强盛时，就强迫他们服劳役。
